supported_here: H49 lands the required explicit post-R50 docs-only interpretation packet.
H49 freezes R50 as narrow exact tiny-C support only while preserving H43 as the paper-grade endpoint.
H49 restores no active downstream runtime lane after the completed F25 -> R50 path.
unsupported_here: H49 does not widen the claim ceiling beyond bounded useful cases.
H49 does not authorize arbitrary C, broader Wasm, or a new downstream runtime lane.
H49 does not replace H43 as the paper-grade endpoint.
disconfirmed_here: The idea that positive R50 evidence should automatically authorize broader compiler scope or a new runtime lane without another explicit packet.
